zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Lovel Lord of Cary於1196年之前出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利時，他的父親Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary31歲，母親Christiana36歲。他於大約1210年與Alice Lovel在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1255年1月21日之前在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Lovel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lovell
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Lovel Lord of Cary was born before 1196, in North Cadbury, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary, was 31 and his mother, Christiana, was 36. He married Alice Lovel about 1210, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 21 January 1255, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Lovel Lord of Cary est né avant 1196, à North Cadbury, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Christiana, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Alice Lovel environ 1210, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 21 janvier 1255, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Lovel Lord of Cary vor 1196 in North Cadbury, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary 31 und seine Mutter Christiana 36. ja.lifeSummary: Richard Lovel Lord of Caryが1196年以前にイギリスイギリスソメルセトノース カドブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Caryは31歳，母Christianaは36歳であった。約1210年にイギリスでAlice Lovelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1255年1月21日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Lovel Lord of Cary(이)가 1196년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 노르스 카드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Christiana(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1210년 영국에서 Alice Lovel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1255년 1월 21일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Lovel Lord of Cary nasceu antes 1196, em North Cadbury, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Christiana, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Lovel aproximadamente 1210, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 21 de janeiro de 1255, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Lovel Lord of Cary родился перед 1196 г. в местности норт кадбури, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Christiana, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Lovel около 1210 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 21 январь 1255 г. в его родном городе.
